title: Field Selectors — Custom resources fields
text:
All custom resource types support the
metadata.name
and
metadata.namespace
fields.
Additionally, the
spec.versions[*].selectableFields
field of a
CustomResourceDefinition
declares which other fields in a custom resource may be used in field selectors. See
selectable fields for custom resources
for more information about how to use field selectors with CustomResourceDefinitions.
